markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To provide training on the article generation grid process and walkthrough a sample article creation.](https://fathom.video/share/XmR4EzSuso51jzpAy99roy_jzBRUYuU_?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The article generation process emphasizes connecting audience pain points to the topic and product solution](https://fathom.video/share/XmR4EzSuso51jzpAy99roy_jzBRUYuU_?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Outline creation should involve using AI tools (like Claude) strategically to develop targeted, audience-specific content structures](https://fathom.video/share/XmR4EzSuso51jzpAy99roy_jzBRUYuU_?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [New step added for Galileo/Prophecy: Enriching outlines with insights from podcast/webinar transcripts before grid input](https://fathom.video/share/XmR4EzSuso51jzpAy99roy_jzBRUYuU_?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Major grid defect identified: H3 headers not being properly formatted/included in article generation output](https://fathom.video/share/XmR4EzSuso51jzpAy99roy_jzBRUYuU_?tab=summary&timestamp=2862.0)

## Topics

### Article Generation Grid Overview

  - [Key columns: keyword/title, company context, assignment brief, research, outline, title gen, article gen, polishing instructions](https://fathom.video/share/XmR4EzSuso51jzpAy99roy_jzBRUYuU_?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [Assignment brief is crucial - spend most time here as it's the foundation for the outline](https://fathom.video/share/XmR4EzSuso51jzpAy99roy_jzBRUYuU_?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Outline should be viewed/edited in code, not markdown](https://fathom.video/share/XmR4EzSuso51jzpAy99roy_jzBRUYuU_?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Polishing instructions incorporate style guide and client-specific requirements](https://fathom.video/share/XmR4EzSuso51jzpAy99roy_jzBRUYuU_?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)

### Strategic Outline Development Process

  - [Use Perplexity for initial research on existing content](https://fathom.video/share/XmR4EzSuso51jzpAy99roy_jzBRUYuU_?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [Leverage Claude for creative outline development:](https://fathom.video/share/XmR4EzSuso51jzpAy99roy_jzBRUYuU_?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
      - [Specify audience (e.g. AI architects in mid-size to enterprise companies)](https://fathom.video/share/XmR4EzSuso51jzpAy99roy_jzBRUYuU_?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
      - [Define Claude's role as experienced content strategist](https://fathom.video/share/XmR4EzSuso51jzpAy99roy_jzBRUYuU_?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
      - [Identify key audience pain points related to the topic](https://fathom.video/share/XmR4EzSuso51jzpAy99roy_jzBRUYuU_?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
      - [Generate outline addressing pain points and connecting to product solution](https://fathom.video/share/XmR4EzSuso51jzpAy99roy_jzBRUYuU_?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [Aim for \~5 main sections in a 1500-2000 word article](https://fathom.video/share/XmR4EzSuso51jzpAy99roy_jzBRUYuU_?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)

### Podcast/Webinar Insight Integration

  - [New step for Galileo/Prophecy: Analyze relevant podcast/webinar transcripts](https://fathom.video/share/XmR4EzSuso51jzpAy99roy_jzBRUYuU_?tab=summary&timestamp=2228.0)
  - [Use Claude to identify opportunities to enrich outline with transcript insights](https://fathom.video/share/XmR4EzSuso51jzpAy99roy_jzBRUYuU_?tab=summary&timestamp=2434.0)
  - [Add relevant points as writer instructions in the assignment brief](https://fathom.video/share/XmR4EzSuso51jzpAy99roy_jzBRUYuU_?tab=summary&timestamp=2460.0)

### Grid Defect and Workaround

  - [Major issue: H3 headers not properly formatted/included in article generation](https://fathom.video/share/XmR4EzSuso51jzpAy99roy_jzBRUYuU_?tab=summary&timestamp=2862.0)
  - [Temporary solution: Generate article in Claude, to be reviewed later](https://fathom.video/share/XmR4EzSuso51jzpAy99roy_jzBRUYuU_?tab=summary&timestamp=2947.0)
  - [Urgently flagged to engineering team for resolution](https://fathom.video/share/XmR4EzSuso51jzpAy99roy_jzBRUYuU_?tab=summary&timestamp=2965.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Usman to practice the new process with existing Galileo content and podcast transcripts](https://fathom.video/share/XmR4EzSuso51jzpAy99roy_jzBRUYuU_?tab=summary&timestamp=2720.0)
  - [Nika to use Claude for immediate article generation due to grid defect](https://fathom.video/share/XmR4EzSuso51jzpAy99roy_jzBRUYuU_?tab=summary&timestamp=2932.0)
  - [Team to flag H3 formatting issue as urgent defect to engineering](https://fathom.video/share/XmR4EzSuso51jzpAy99roy_jzBRUYuU_?tab=summary&timestamp=2965.0)
  - [Vivek to review Claude-generated articles upon return](https://fathom.video/share/XmR4EzSuso51jzpAy99roy_jzBRUYuU_?tab=summary&timestamp=2947.0)
  - [Update internal SOP documentation with new process details](https://fathom.video/share/XmR4EzSuso51jzpAy99roy_jzBRUYuU_?tab=summary&timestamp=2170.0)
